label: 1531 CE
era_summary: Year 1531 (MDXXXI) was a common year starting on Sunday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Brecke records no major conflicts touching this region in 1531 (safety scored at the era baseline of 85). No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
